---
title: "Dynamic Linking"
description: |
  Combining faceting with dynamic queries.
author:
  - name: Kris Sankaran
    affiliation: UW Madison
date: 02-12-2021
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = TRUE)
library("robservable")
```

_[Reading](https://rafalab.github.io/dsbook/ggplot2.html), [Recording],  [Rmarkdown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/krisrs1128/stat479/master/_posts/2021-01-12-week1-2/week1-2.Rmd)_
